acceptance_criteria.description: Given: State is IDLE. When: SEND_MESSAGE dispatched with content. Then: Transitions to PLANNING.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit test: should transition from IDLE to PLANNING when SEND_MESSAGE is dispatched with content

acceptance_criteria.description: Given: State is PLANNING. When: PLANNING_SUCCESS dispatched. Then: Transitions to ROUTE_RESULTS.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit test: should transition from PLANNING to ROUTE_RESULTS when PLANNING_SUCCESS is dispatched

acceptance_criteria.description: Given: State is ROUTE_RESULTS. When: NAVIGATE_EXPORT dispatched, selectedRouteId is null. Then: Transition rejected (guard).
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit test: should reject NAVIGATE_EXPORT transition when selectedRouteId is null

acceptance_criteria.description: Given: Any state. When: NEW_SESSION dispatched. Then: Resets all state to IDLE.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit test: should reset from any state to IDLE when NEW_SESSION is dispatched

acceptance_criteria.description: Given: State is IDLE. When: LOAD_SESSION dispatched. Then: Populates routeOptions from attachment.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit test: should load session data into IDLE state

test_results.coverage: All state transitions and guards tested

implementation_summary: Implemented pure state machine hook with 6 states (IDLE, PLANNING, ROUTE_RESULTS, ROUTE_DETAILS, SESSION_HISTORY, NAVIGATION_EXPORT) with guarded transitions. Drop-in replacement for existing planningReducer. TypeScript strict mode compliant. No UI rendering or side effects - pure state management.
